title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data for physical AI applications. It enables robots to understand and predict real-world dynamics as part of NVIDIA's integrated physical AI stack.
